---
description: "Use when reviewing language, framework, architecture, middleware, routing, services, boundaries, dependency injection, configuration, and deployment before SDK integration."
---
# Architecture Review

- Determine language, framework, runtime, package manager, and deployment model.
- Map project structure, architecture style, service boundaries, middleware, routing, dependency injection, and configuration patterns.
- Identify existing auth, authorization, and credential flows.
- Identify where Caracal naturally fits and where it should not be introduced.
- Prefer existing files and patterns over new directories or abstractions.

Return recommended and optional integration points with reasons.
